katas.title: Simulate a Ping-Pong TDD Session
katas.prompt: Walk through a ping-pong TDD pairing session for implementing a simple stack data structure (push, pop, peek, isEmpty). Show what Person A writes, then what Person B writes, alternating. Demonstrate natural test-first rhythm.
criteria: Clear alternation between Person A and Person B
Each person writes a failing test then the other makes it pass
